languages.text: "Я Вольный Торговец, а не целитель душ. Сколько еще мне его развлекать?"
"I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"
languages.original_text: "Я Вольный Торговец, а не целитель душ. Сколько еще мне его развлекать?"

traits.locale_text: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"
"I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"
"I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. Sort it out without my supervision."
"I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"
"I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"

languages.text: 「私はローグ・トレーダーであって、魂の癒し手ではない。私の立ち会いなしで片を付けろ」
languages.original_text: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. Sort it out without my supervision."

traits.locale_text: 「私はローグ・トレーダーであって、魂の癒し手ではない。私の立ち会いなしで片を付けろ。」

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}, pas {mf|un guérisseur spirituel|une guérisseuse spirituelle}. Combien de temps encore suis-je {mf|censé|censée} le divertir ? »
languages.original_text: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"

traits.locale_text: « Je suis {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande}, pas {mf|un guérisseur spirituel|une guérisseuse spirituelle}. Combien de temps encore suis-je {mf|censé|censée} le divertir ? »

languages.text: "Ben Hür Tacir'im, ruh şifacısı değilim. Onu daha ne kadar eğlememi bekliyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"

traits.locale_text: "Ben Hür Tacir'im, ruh şifacısı değilim. Onu daha ne kadar eğlememi bekliyorsun?"

languages.text: Ich bin {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}, kein Seelenklempner! Wie lange soll ich ihn denn noch unterhalten?"
languages.original_text: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"

traits.locale_text: Ich bin {mf|der Freihändler|die Freihändlerin}, kein Seelenklempner! Wie lange soll ich ihn denn noch unterhalten?"

languages.text: «Soy Comerciante Independiente, no curander{mf|o|a} de almas. ¿Cuánto tiempo esperan que lo entretenga?».
languages.original_text: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"

traits.locale_text: «Soy Comerciante Independiente, no curander{mf|o|a} de almas. ¿Cuánto tiempo esperan que lo entretenga?».

languages.text: “我是行商浪人，不是灵魂治疗师。你还打算让我陪他耗多久？”
languages.original_text: "I am the Rogue Trader, not a soul healer. How much longer do you expect me to entertain him?"

traits.locale_text: “我是行商浪人，不是灵魂治疗师。你还打算让我陪他耗多久？”
